examples: An apple a day keeps the doctor away.
She sliced an apple for breakfast.
note: 常见基础词，既可表示水果，也常出现在科技语境中。

meanings: 解决问题的一组明确步骤
examples: This algorithm improves search efficiency.
We studied a sorting algorithm in class.
note: 计算机课程中的高频词汇，适合演示技术类查词。

examples: Her ambition pushed her to keep learning.
He spoke about his ambition to become an engineer.
note: 既可用于学习目标，也常用于职业发展表达。

examples: Please analyze the task before coding.
The report analyzes user behavior.
note: 适合软件工程和数据分析场景。

examples: That is a brilliant solution.
The sky looked brilliant after the rain.
note: 既可形容人的表现，也可形容光线或颜色。

examples: This project is a real challenge.
She likes to challenge herself.
note: 在课程项目、比赛和成长语境中都很常见。

examples: It takes courage to try something new.
His courage inspired the whole team.
note: 适合演示中文关键词反查英文。

examples: Curious students ask better questions.
She is curious about machine learning.
note: 与学习、探索、研究等主题关联紧密。

examples: A dictionary helps students build vocabulary.
This electronic dictionary runs offline.
note: 项目核心主题词，用于演示本软件自身能力。

examples: An efficient workflow saves time.
The new design is more efficient.
note: 输入 eff 时可以很好地演示联想搜索。

examples: Please give me an example sentence.
This project is a good example of JavaFX.
note: 常与句子展示和教学场景一起使用。

examples: Students can explore English through examples.
We explored several UI ideas.
note: 适合演示学习型软件的语境。

examples: The focus of the app is fast lookup.
Try to focus on the key requirement.
note: 名词和动词两种词性都很常见。

examples: We need to improve the search experience.
Practice helps improve pronunciation.
note: 适合描述第二阶段项目优化内容。

examples: Good software can inspire confidence.
Her speech inspired the class.
note: 常用于表达积极影响。

examples: We learn by building projects.
Children learn languages quickly.
note: 中文关键词“学习”反查英文的典型示例。

examples: The university library stays open late.
This project uses a JSON parsing library.
note: 在程序开发中也可指代码库或依赖库。

examples: The app can fall back to a network lookup.
Students network through online communities.
note: 第二阶段新增联网能力时会频繁出现。

examples: The dictionary still works offline.
Please keep an offline copy for the demo.
note: 用于强调本地词库的基础能力。

examples: Caching can improve performance.
Her performance in class was impressive.
note: 既可用于系统优化，也可用于一般表达。

examples: This project uses JavaFX and Maven.
Our final project needs a desktop package.
note: 课程作业与软件作品场景中的核心词。

examples: The result panel shows meanings and examples.
Please compare the local and online results.
note: 适合演示统一查询结果模型。

examples: This software is built for classroom demonstration.
We want the software to feel like a real app.
note: 第二阶段目标之一就是让项目更像正式软件。

examples: The online service can translate unknown words.
Please translate the sentence into Chinese.
note: 联网兜底能力的关键动词。

examples: The user can double-click the launcher to open the app.
Clear status messages help the user.
note: 适合描述交互设计与使用体验。

examples: Reading helps build vocabulary.
The dictionary expands your vocabulary bank.
note: 与学习英语最直接相关的高频词。

examples: The application window now shows source information.
Open the window to let in some fresh air.
note: 桌面应用开发中的常见术语。

examples: An efficient workflow saves time.
The packaging workflow is now documented.
note: 适合描述开发、打包和演示流程。
